title: capsella provincialis
intro: Capsella provincialis, also known as Field Pepperwort or Provençal Shepherd's Cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Capsella provincialis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate colds and fever, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Capsella provincialis can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to treat wounds and skin irritations.
